description_long: This is a large, bulbous ceramic vase with a wide, rounded body tapering to a narrower base and a flared, uneven rim. The surface is matte and shows signs of age, with visible discoloration, patches, and surface wear, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled frequently. The coloration is predominantly a weathered, earthy beige with darker stains and lighter patches, giving it an ancient, utilitarian appearance. The rim is slightly irregular, with a darker inner edge, and the body lacks any visible handles or decorative embellishments. The vase appears to be hollow, suitable for holding water, plants, or other contents. Its robust form and weathered finish make it well-suited for outdoor or rustic urban settings such as parks or courtyards.
description: A large, weathered ceramic vase with a rounded body, flared rim, and aged, patchy surface in earthy tones. The vase has a utilitarian, ancient look with visible wear and no decorative embellishments.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from a slightly angled front, showing the flared rim and prominent surface discoloration and patches on the upper and lower body.
description_view_1: This view highlights the smoother side of the vase, with fewer visible stains and a more uniform beige coloration, while the rim remains uneven.
description_view_2: The vase appears more uniformly colored from this angle, with minimal visible patches and a subtle curve to the body.
description_view_3: This view shows a large, distinct patch on the lower right side and a slightly more pronounced curvature of the body, with the rim's irregularity visible.
